title: ArmorTweaks
description: Different armor and damage mechanics that make make survival more suitable for PvP.
body:
# ArmorTweaks
ArmorTweaks changes different armor and damage mechanics to make survival more suitable for PvP.

## Features
- Players without armor are stronger (compared to vanilla)
- Players with strong armor are weaker (compared to vanilla)
- Enchantment Protection is nerfed, but is no longer capped at 20
- Ender Pearl damage is decreased from 2.5 to 2 hearts, but is untied from Feather Falling enchantment
- Explosions deal less damage as a balance for the nerfed armor
- Anchor explosion power is slightly reduced

For a more detailed overview you can check out [ArmorTweaks Github Page](https://github.com/Blumbo/ArmorTweaks/tree/1.19.2).
